name: cap
title: Cap
description: Control Cap screen recording directly from Raycast.
author: CapSoftware

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.description: Start a new screen recording in Cap.

commands.name: stop-recording
commands.title: Stop Recording
commands.description: Stop the current screen recording in Cap.

commands.name: pause-recording
commands.title: Pause Recording
commands.description: Pause the current screen recording in Cap.

commands.name: resume-recording
commands.title: Resume Recording
commands.description: Resume the current screen recording in Cap.

commands.name: toggle-pause-recording
commands.title: Toggle Pause Recording
commands.description: Toggle pause/resume the current screen recording in Cap.

commands.name: mute-recording
commands.title: Mute Recording
commands.description: Mute the microphone during recording in Cap.

commands.name: unmute-recording
commands.title: Unmute Recording
commands.description: Unmute the microphone during recording in Cap.

commands.name: toggle-mute-recording
commands.title: Toggle Mute Recording
commands.description: Toggle mute/unmute the microphone during recording in Cap.
